tip: Drink at least 8-10 glasses of water daily to stay hydrated.
Apply SPF 50+ sunscreen every 2 hours when outdoors.
Wear lightweight, light-colored cotton clothes to stay cool.
Avoid direct sunlight between 10 AM and 4 PM when UV rays are strongest.
Eat water-rich fruits like watermelon, cucumber, and oranges.
Use polarized sunglasses to protect your eyes from harsh glare.
Take cool showers to lower your body temperature after being outside.
Keep indoor plants to naturally cool down your living space.
Never leave children or pets in a parked car, even for a minute.
Apply aloe vera gel to soothe skin after a long day in the sun.
